description: Screenshot of a file selection dialog showing the selection of a metadata file. The navigation path indicates the user is in "UrbanAtlas2018 > AT005L3_INNSBRUCK_UA2018_v012 > Metadata". A file named "AT005L3_INNSBRUCK_UA2018_v012" is highlighted, showing an "Änderungsdatum" (Modification Date) of "15.01.2021 14:48" and a "Typ" (Type) of "XML-Datei" (XML-File). The "Dateiname:" (Filename:) input field at the bottom displays "AT005L3_INNSBRUCK_UA2018_v012". Buttons for "Alle Dateien" (All Files) and "Öffnen" (Open) are visible. This screenshot appears in the context of an "Add Ingestion - Step 3" process, relating to selecting an attribute name for a class code, as per the surrounding documentation.
